title: Hunchuzuc Den
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hunchuzuc Den''' was a [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] [[Den (Selonian)|den]] dedicated to ending the rule of the [[Overden]] over [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]]. After being tricked into submitting to the Overden, they learned the truth of who truly controlled [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia's]] [[Planetary repulsor]] and gained more power than before due to the Overden's lies and shame.

Its activities were watched by the [[New Republic Observer]] [[Fulin Gor]], who watched for any violations in New Republic edicts during their rise to power.

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''
